scripts.dev: npm run build:frontend && cd backend && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run clean:frontend && cd frontend && npm run build && cd .. && npm run validate:frontend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check:backend && npm run type-check:frontend
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push --skip-generate
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
